race.comment: TURBO TORQUE (18) is knocking on the door of a maiden victory hitting the top-four in all six run this preparation and this is not an overly strong affair. Has placed two of three around this circuit and should be right there when the judge calls a halt. TEXAS (3) has been thereabouts in all three career starts to date and gets the services of gun hoop Maloney in the irons. Capable of taking this out. The well-related LUCCI (10) (half to G3 winner and G1 placed Outrageous) strips fitter third-up from the spell and looks a genuine top-three prospect against this line-up. PONTEVICO (1) just missed the placings here on debut and will have taken some benefit from that day at the races. In the mix. ZOUSAIN GIRL (19) best of the rest.
